name: io.github.RCS-kz/bitrix24-mcp
description: Bitrix24 Cloud MCP server — 45 tools across CRM, Tasks, Deals, Leads, Files, Disk.

environmentVariables.name: BITRIX24_WEBHOOK_URL
environmentVariables.description: Inbound webhook URL of your Bitrix24 portal (https://<portal>.bitrix24.kz/rest/<user_id>/<token>/). Stored in the OS keychain on first run; this env var is a fallback for CI / containerised / headless deployments.

environmentVariables.name: RCS_LICENSE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Commercial license key issued after the 14-day trial. Stored in the OS keychain on first run; env var fallback only needed for CI / headless deployments.
